caption: In a neon-lit, purple-hued interior with horizontal blinds in the background, several people are gathered. On the left, a person in a blue shirt interacts with someone in a dark jacket. A close-up shot features a person with curly hair looking downward, while another person sits at a table in the background. The text "KIN KIN!" appears in large, silver, three-dimensional letters across the scene. The view then transitions to a product shot featuring two glass bottles of liquid against a light purple background. The bottle on the left contains a reddish liquid and the bottle on the right contains a clear liquid. Both bottles feature a "Kin" logo and the text "EUPHORICS FOR HUMANKIND". The red bottle is labeled "HIGH RHODORA SOCIAL TONIC" and the clear bottle is labeled "DREAM LIGHT NIGHTCAP". Both bottles include the text "DIETARY SUPPLEMENT".
